urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: Italian officials handed jail terms for Genoa bridge disaster that killed 43
latest.summary: Giovanni Castellucci, the former head of Italy's motorway operator, has been sentenced to 12 years in prison for his role in the Genoa bridge disaster that resulted in 43 fatalities. The bridge collapsed during a rainstorm in August 2018, leading to significant public outcry and legal proceedings against multiple defendants.
latest.details: Giovanni Castellucci, the former head of Italy's motorway operator, has been sentenced to 12 years in prison for his role in the Genoa bridge disaster that resulted in 43 fatalities. The bridge collapsed during a rainstorm in August 2018, leading to significant public outcry and legal proceedings against multiple defendants. Prosecutors had sought a total of 400 years in prison for all 57 defendants involved in the case, citing failures in maintenance. Castellucci was not present in court for the verdict, which has been met with mixed reactions from victims' families.
latest.full_brief: Giovanni Castellucci, the former head of Italy's motorway operator, has been sentenced to 12 years in prison for his role in the Genoa bridge disaster that resulted in 43 fatalities. The bridge collapsed during a rainstorm in August 2018, leading to significant public outcry and legal proceedings against multiple defendants. Prosecutors had sought a total of 400 years in prison for all 57 defendants involved in the case, citing failures in maintenance. Castellucci was not present in court for the verdict, which has been met with mixed reactions from victims' families.

latest.title: Air quality plummets in 20 states as smoke from Canadian wildfires spreads across the US
latest.summary: Air quality has deteriorated across 20 states in the US due to smoke from Canadian wildfires, prompting health alerts for millions of residents. The smoke has caused Toronto's air quality to rank among the worst globally, and it has spread to states as far as New York and Minnesota.
latest.details: Air quality has deteriorated across 20 states in the US due to smoke from Canadian wildfires, prompting health alerts for millions of residents. The smoke has caused Toronto's air quality to rank among the worst globally, and it has spread to states as far as New York and Minnesota. NASA reported that winds have carried the smoke southeast, affecting large areas and altering the sky's appearance. Officials have urged residents in affected areas to limit outdoor activities and take precautions against the unhealthy air conditions.
latest.full_brief: Air quality has deteriorated across 20 states in the US due to smoke from Canadian wildfires, prompting health alerts for millions of residents. The smoke has caused Toronto's air quality to rank among the worst globally, and it has spread to states as far as New York and Minnesota. NASA reported that winds have carried the smoke southeast, affecting large areas and altering the sky's appearance. Officials have urged residents in affected areas to limit outdoor activities and take precautions against the unhealthy air conditions.

latest.title: 'A true miracle of destiny' - Messi and Lamine Yamal's incredible first meeting
latest.summary: Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal are set to meet on the field for the first time during the World Cup final, despite their age difference of 20 years. Their first encounter occurred in 2007 when Messi was a rising star and Yamal was just a baby.
latest.details: Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal are set to meet on the field for the first time during the World Cup final, despite their age difference of 20 years. Their first encounter occurred in 2007 when Messi was a rising star and Yamal was just a baby. A series of photographs from that meeting have resurfaced, highlighting the serendipitous connection between the two players. Yamal's family won a competition to have their baby photographed with a Barcelona player, leading to this remarkable moment in football history.
latest.full_brief: Lionel Messi and Lamine Yamal are set to meet on the field for the first time during the World Cup final, despite their age difference of 20 years. Their first encounter occurred in 2007 when Messi was a rising star and Yamal was just a baby. A series of photographs from that meeting have resurfaced, highlighting the serendipitous connection between the two players. Yamal's family won a competition to have their baby photographed with a Barcelona player, leading to this remarkable moment in football history.

latest.title: Volunteer firefighter suspected of starting devastating France forest fire
latest.summary: A volunteer firefighter has been placed under formal investigation in France on suspicion of starting a fire in a forest south of Paris. Prosecutor Diane Ngomsik reported that the volunteer firefighter, 18, had initially confessed to setting fire to twigs with a lighter and petrol before retracting it.
latest.details: A volunteer firefighter has been placed under formal investigation in France on suspicion of starting a fire in a forest south of Paris. Prosecutor Diane Ngomsik reported that the volunteer firefighter, 18, had initially confessed to setting fire to twigs with a lighter and petrol before retracting it. President Macron stated that 10% of the Fontainebleau forest had been burned, and he hailed the fact that there had been no victims so far. The forest is home to the Palace and Park of Fontainebleau, a UNESCO World Heritage site since 1981.
latest.full_brief: A volunteer firefighter has been placed under formal investigation in France on suspicion of starting a fire in a forest south of Paris. Prosecutor Diane Ngomsik reported that the volunteer firefighter, 18, had initially confessed to setting fire to twigs with a lighter and petrol before retracting it. President Macron stated that 10% of the Fontainebleau forest had been burned, and he hailed the fact that there had been no victims so far. The forest is home to the Palace and Park of Fontainebleau, a UNESCO World Heritage site since 1981.

latest.title: US military to start screening for testosterone deficiency, Hegseth says
latest.summary: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has announced that military personnel aged 30 and older will undergo testing for testosterone deficiency as part of annual health screenings. Troops with low testosterone levels will be offered voluntary hormone replacement therapy.
latest.details: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has announced that military personnel aged 30 and older will undergo testing for testosterone deficiency as part of annual health screenings. Troops with low testosterone levels will be offered voluntary hormone replacement therapy. Taking testosterone for non-medical reasons, like artificial muscle enhancement, is strictly prohibited in the military. Democratic Senator Tammy Duckworth called on the defence secretary to make hormone testing available for both men and women.
latest.full_brief: US Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth has announced that military personnel aged 30 and older will undergo testing for testosterone deficiency as part of annual health screenings. Troops with low testosterone levels will be offered voluntary hormone replacement therapy. Taking testosterone for non-medical reasons, like artificial muscle enhancement, is strictly prohibited in the military. Democratic Senator Tammy Duckworth called on the defence secretary to make hormone testing available for both men and women.

latest.title: Chip giant TSMC pledges another $100bn to expand US production
latest.summary: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC plans to invest an additional $100 billion in Arizona to expand its production capabilities in the US. This investment is expected to create tens of thousands of jobs and raises TSMC's total commitment to the US to $265 billion.
latest.details: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC plans to invest an additional $100 billion in Arizona to expand its production capabilities in the US. This investment is expected to create tens of thousands of jobs and raises TSMC's total commitment to the US to $265 billion. The company reported a 77% increase in net profits for the second quarter, reaching $22 billion. TSMC's chips are crucial for advanced technologies, including AI data centers and smart devices.
latest.full_brief: Taiwanese chipmaker TSMC plans to invest an additional $100 billion in Arizona to expand its production capabilities in the US. This investment is expected to create tens of thousands of jobs and raises TSMC's total commitment to the US to $265 billion. The company reported a 77% increase in net profits for the second quarter, reaching $22 billion. TSMC's chips are crucial for advanced technologies, including AI data centers and smart devices.

latest.title: Moment US Navy jet stuns packed Florida beach with low flypast
latest.summary: A US Navy Blue Angels jet performed a low flypast over Pensacola Beach, Florida, during an air show, startling beachgoers. The incident caused beach umbrellas and other items to be blown away, but no injuries were reported.
latest.details: A US Navy Blue Angels jet performed a low flypast over Pensacola Beach, Florida, during an air show, startling beachgoers. The incident caused beach umbrellas and other items to be blown away, but no injuries were reported. Officials from the Blue Angels are reviewing the situation after the aircraft flew lower than standard profiles. One beachgoer described the experience as "amazing" despite the disturbance.
latest.full_brief: A US Navy Blue Angels jet performed a low flypast over Pensacola Beach, Florida, during an air show, startling beachgoers. The incident caused beach umbrellas and other items to be blown away, but no injuries were reported. Officials from the Blue Angels are reviewing the situation after the aircraft flew lower than standard profiles. One beachgoer described the experience as "amazing" despite the disturbance.

latest.title: Actor Sam Neill died from pneumonia, agent confirms
latest.summary: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor known for his roles in Jurassic Park and Peaky Blinders, died from pneumonia at the age of 78. His family described his death as "sudden and unexpected" and confirmed he had been in remission from non-Hodgkin's lymphoma.
latest.details: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor known for his roles in Jurassic Park and Peaky Blinders, died from pneumonia at the age of 78. His family described his death as "sudden and unexpected" and confirmed he had been in remission from non-Hodgkin's lymphoma. Neill's agent clarified that he had been actively working on multiple projects prior to his illness. Tributes from fellow actors and public figures highlighted his impact on the film industry and his legacy.
latest.full_brief: Sam Neill, the New Zealand actor known for his roles in Jurassic Park and Peaky Blinders, died from pneumonia at the age of 78. His family described his death as "sudden and unexpected" and confirmed he had been in remission from non-Hodgkin's lymphoma. Neill's agent clarified that he had been actively working on multiple projects prior to his illness. Tributes from fellow actors and public figures highlighted his impact on the film industry and his legacy.

latest.title: Apple’s OLED iPad Mini upgrade is on the way as prices continue to rise
latest.summary: Apple is reportedly planning an OLED upgrade for the iPad Mini, which could be released as soon as October. This upgrade would mark the most significant refresh for the iPad Mini since its redesign in 2021.
latest.details: Apple is reportedly planning an OLED upgrade for the iPad Mini, which could be released as soon as October. This upgrade would mark the most significant refresh for the iPad Mini since its redesign in 2021. Alongside the iPad Mini, Apple is also considering upgrades for the iPad Air and the base iPad, with the latter expected to receive only minor updates. Price increases for the iPad Mini and other products have been attributed to a RAM shortage affecting the tech industry.
latest.full_brief: Apple is reportedly planning an OLED upgrade for the iPad Mini, which could be released as soon as October. This upgrade would mark the most significant refresh for the iPad Mini since its redesign in 2021. Alongside the iPad Mini, Apple is also considering upgrades for the iPad Air and the base iPad, with the latter expected to receive only minor updates. Price increases for the iPad Mini and other products have been attributed to a RAM shortage affecting the tech industry.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
